channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump rejects Iran ceasefire proposal as totally unacceptable
item.description: President Trump dismissed Iran's counteroffer to end the war, calling it "unbelievably weak" and saying the ceasefire is on "massive life support." Iran reportedly demanded lifting of the US naval blockade and recognition of sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇿🇦 South African president refuses to resign after impeachment call
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa stated he would not step down following days of speculation and an impeachment call, amid political turmoil in South Africa.

item.title: ⛽🇺🇸 Trump proposes suspending federal gasoline tax amid Iran war
item.description: President Trump announced plans to suspend the federal gasoline tax to ease prices as the Iran war continues to disrupt oil markets and keep the Strait of Hormuz closed. Critics note he cannot implement this unilaterally without Congress.

item.title: 🌏🛢️ Asia braces for second wave of energy shocks from Iran war
item.description: Asian economies are preparing for another wave of energy disruptions as the Iran conflict continues, with shipping routes through the Strait of Hormuz remaining blocked and oil supplies constrained.

item.title: 🇿🇦 South African President Ramaphosa Refuses to Resign After Impeachment Call
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa said he would not step down amid growing speculation and political pressure, rejecting calls for his resignation.

item.title: 🇿🇦 Dozens of Nigerian fishermen feared dead after Chad airstrikes on Boko Haram
item.description: Chadian air strikes targeting Boko Haram fighters near Lake Chad may have killed dozens of Nigerian fishermen, with reports of 40 people feared dead from the strikes or drowning while fleeing.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu says Iran war not over, signals indefinite fighting with Hezbollah
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu declared the Iran war is not over and indicated that fighting with Hezbollah could continue indefinitely, despite ceasefire discussions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Outgoing Mossad chief warns against Gofman appointment in letter to High Court
item.description: Israel's outgoing Mossad director sent a letter to the High Court warning against the appointment of a figure named Gofman to a key position, raising concerns about the selection process.

item.title: 🇨🇦🇹🇷 Canada eyes Turkey as fellow mid-power ally in weapons development
item.description: Canada is exploring defense cooperation with Turkey as both countries seek to develop weapons capabilities as mid-power allies, potentially deepening defense industrial partnerships.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC oil output at 26-year low amid Iran war
item.description: A Reuters survey shows OPEC oil production has fallen to its lowest level in 26 years as the Iran conflict disrupts production and exports from the region.

item.title: 🇷🇺 The Guardian: Why is Putin now talking about the war in Ukraine coming to an end?
item.description: Vladimir Putin's recent statements about the Ukraine war potentially ending have sparked analysis about Russia's strategic calculations and whether this signals a genuine shift or diplomatic posturing.

item.title: 🖼️ Portrait looted by Nazis found in home of Dutch SS leader's descendants
item.description: A painting believed to have been plundered by high-ranking Nazi Hermann Goering during World War Two has been discovered in the home of descendants of a Dutch SS leader.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Washington dinner shooting suspect pleads not guilty
item.description: Cole Tomas Allen, 31, was charged with attempting to assassinate US President Donald Trump after a shooting incident at a Washington dinner. He has pleaded not guilty to the charges.

item.title: 🇲🇽 Six found dead in shipping container at Texas border rail yard
item.description: Six people were found dead in a shipping container at a rail yard near the Texas-Mexico border, with heat stroke suspected as the cause of death. The victims are believed to be migrants.

item.title: 🚢 Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship: Passengers evacuated and quarantined
item.description: A hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship has led to passenger evacuations and quarantines, with cases identified in multiple countries including the US, Canada, and France.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippine VP Sara Duterte impeached for a second time
item.description: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte has been impeached for a second time by the House of Representatives. If convicted in a Senate trial, she would be disqualified from running for president.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israeli attacks kill at least four in southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli military operations in southern Lebanon have resulted in at least four deaths, as cross-border violence continues despite broader ceasefire discussions in the region.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli soldiers jailed for desecration of Virgin Mary statue in Lebanon
item.description: Israeli soldiers have been sentenced to prison for desecrating a Virgin Mary statue during operations in Lebanon, sparking outrage and diplomatic tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky's former second-in-command Yermak charged in major corruption probe
item.description: Andriy Yermak, former chief of staff to President Zelensky, has been charged in a major corruption investigation, marking a significant development in Ukraine's anti-corruption efforts.

item.title: 🇰🇵 Russia paid North Korea up to $13.8B for help fighting Ukraine, South Korean intelligence says
item.description: South Korean intelligence reports that Russia has paid North Korea up to $13.8 billion for military assistance in the Ukraine war, revealing the deepening military partnership between Moscow and Pyongyang.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇺🇦 Ukraine and Germany sign defense cooperation agreement with joint drone production plan
item.description: Ukraine and Germany have signed a defense cooperation agreement that includes plans for joint drone production, deepening military ties between Kyiv and Berlin.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Ukrainian drone strike on empty Baltic fuel depot prompts top-level resignation in Latvia
item.description: A Ukrainian drone strike on a fuel depot in the Baltic region, which turned out to be empty, has led to a high-level resignation in Latvia amid questions about security protocols.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump's China visit set to test fragile tariff truce
item.description: The first US presidential visit to China in almost 10 years will test a fragile tariff truce between Washington and Beijing as economic tensions persist.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Elon Musk and Tim Cook among CEOs expected to accompany Trump on China trip
item.description: A total of 17 US executives including Elon Musk and Tim Cook are expected to join President Trump on his visit to China, where he will meet Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping.
